title: Senior Teacher - Aakash Educational Services - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Aakash Educational Services - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
Join the Aakash Educational Services family as a Senior Teacher in Kochi. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Aakash Educational Services:
Aakash Educational Services is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Support students with special educational needs
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Aakash Educational Services!
